import:MAGENTA.description: MAGENTA is not a valid Manim CE color constant
import:MAGENTA.fix_hint: Replace MAGENTA with RED or use hex '#FF00FF'. Valid colors: RED GREEN BLUE YELLOW ORANGE PURPLE PINK TEAL GOLD MAROON WHITE GRAY BLACK.

import:CYAN.description: CYAN is not a valid Manim CE color constant
import:CYAN.fix_hint: Replace CYAN with TEAL or TEAL_A, or use hex '#00FFFF'.

import:VIOLET.description: VIOLET is not a valid Manim CE color constant
import:VIOLET.fix_hint: Replace VIOLET with PURPLE or use hex '#EE82EE'.

import:INDIGO.description: INDIGO is not a valid Manim CE color constant
import:INDIGO.fix_hint: Replace INDIGO with PURPLE or DARK_BLUE, or use hex '#4B0082'.

import:LIME.description: LIME is not a valid Manim CE color constant
import:LIME.fix_hint: Replace LIME with GREEN or GREEN_A, or use hex '#00FF00'.

attribute:camera_frame.description: self.camera_frame was renamed to self.camera.frame in Manim >= 0.17

api:radians_kwarg.description: Rotate() uses angle= keyword, not radians=
api:radians_kwarg.fix_hint: Replace radians=X with angle=X in all Rotate() and similar animation calls.

api:fadein_positional.description: FadeIn/FadeOut direction must be a keyword argument (shift=)
api:fadein_positional.fix_hint: Use FadeIn(obj, shift=UP) instead of FadeIn(obj, UP). Direction is always a keyword argument in Manim CE.

api:wrong_vgroup_string.description: VGroup only accepts Mobject instances, not plain strings
api:wrong_vgroup_string.fix_hint: Wrap any string inside Text() or Tex() before adding to VGroup. Example: VGroup(Text('label'), equation) not VGroup('label', equation).

api:dashed_line_zero.description: DashedLine/Line with start == end crashes during Create()
api:dashed_line_zero.fix_hint: Ensure start and end points are different. If computed dynamically, add a guard: if np.allclose(start, end): skip or add small offset.

api:create_text_deprecated.description: TextMobject is deprecated; use Text() or Tex()
api:create_text_deprecated.fix_hint: Replace TextMobject('...') with Text('...') for plain text or Tex(r'...') for LaTeX text.

api:number_plane_range.description: NumberPlane x_range or y_range too large causes memory issues
api:number_plane_range.fix_hint: Keep NumberPlane ranges reasonable: x_range=[-7, 7], y_range=[-4, 4]. Very large ranges slow rendering significantly.

import:kokoro_koko.description: Old kokoro_mv.koko import path no longer valid
import:kokoro_koko.fix_hint: Replace 'from kokoro_mv.koko import KokoroService' with 'from kokoro_mv import KokoroService'.

import:missing_numpy.description: numpy not imported but np.array() or np.* used
import:missing_numpy.fix_hint: Add 'import numpy as np' at the top of the file.

import:missing_manim.fix_hint: Ensure 'from manim import *' is the first import. If a specific class is missing, check the Manim CE 0.17+ API — some names changed (e.g. GraphScene → Axes).

latex:missing_dollar.description: LaTeX compilation error: stray $ or missing math mode
latex:missing_dollar.fix_hint: In MathTex(), do NOT add $ or $$ — they are added automatically. Use raw strings: MathTex(r'\frac{d}{dt}'). In Tex(), use $...$ (single dollar) for inline math, never $$...$$.

latex:undefined_control.description: LaTeX undefined control sequence in MathTex expression
latex:undefined_control.fix_hint: Check all LaTeX commands are valid. Common mistakes: \text{} needs amsmath (use Tex() instead), \operatorname{} needs amsmath, use r-strings to avoid Python escape issues.

latex:brace_mismatch.fix_hint: Count opening { and closing } in each MathTex argument. Every { must have a matching }. Split long expressions into multiple string arguments to MathTex().

api:kokoro_model_path.description: Old KokoroService API used model_path and voices_path arguments
api:kokoro_model_path.fix_hint: Use: self.set_speech_service(KokoroService(voice='af_sarah', lang='en-us')). Remove model_path=, voices_path=, and old voice='af' arguments entirely.

dependency:sox.description: sox audio tool not found — required by manim-voiceover
dependency:sox.fix_hint: This is a system dependency error, not a code error. Install sox: https://sox.sourceforge.net/ or 'winget install sox'.

syntax:indentation.description: Python IndentationError — likely caused by mixed tabs/spaces
syntax:indentation.fix_hint: Use 4 spaces per indent level throughout. No tabs. Check that all code inside construct() is properly indented.

api:self_play_outside.description: self.play() called outside construct() or outside a voiceover block incorrectly
api:self_play_outside.fix_hint: All self.play() calls must be inside construct(). Animation code inside 'with self.voiceover(...):' blocks is correct. Do not call self.play() inside list comprehensions or lambdas.

api:mobject_not_in_scene.description: Animating a Mobject that was never added or already removed
api:mobject_not_in_scene.fix_hint: Ensure each object is created and added to the scene before animating. Do not FadeOut an object twice. Updaters on removed objects cause this error — call clear_updaters() before FadeOut.

api:learned_70432.description: Learned fix: Animation 0: FadeIn(Text('Simple Harmonic Motion')):   0%|          | 0/15 [00:0
api:learned_70432.fix_hint: This error was successfully fixed in a previous run. Error was: Animation 0: FadeIn(Text('Simple Harmonic Motion')):   0%|          | 0/15 [00:00<?, ?it/s]
example_errors:
Animation 0: FadeIn(Text('Simple Harmonic Motion')):   0%|          | 0/15 [00:00<?, ?it/s]
Animation 0: FadeIn(Text('Simple Harmonic Motion')): 100%|##########| 15/15 [00:00<00:00, 149.95it/s]
